privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. Task.json contains no metadata field. The task is an interactive automation task for Nx Witness VMS (real, non-synthetic software from Network Optix). The environment installs actual Nx Witness Server version 5.1.5.39242 (or 6.0.1.39873) from official Network Optix repositories (updates.networkoptix.com). Claims in the task description (system name 'GymAnythingVMS', credentials 'admin/Admin1234!', web admin URL 'https://localhost:7001/static/index.html') are setup values configured in setup_nx_witness.sh and are consistent with the actual system initialization.
